description_long: This dumbbell features a cylindrical handle with a smooth, light-colored surface, likely made of metal or coated plastic, connecting two larger, rounded end caps. The end caps are dark in color and appear to be coated with a textured, semi-soft material, possibly rubber or neoprene, providing grip and protection against impact. The handle is straight and uniform in diameter, with no visible ergonomic shaping or knurling. Both end caps are symmetrical, with flat faces and slightly beveled edges, giving the dumbbell a balanced and modern appearance. There are no visible brand logos or weight markings on any surface. The object appears clean, intact, and free from visible wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A compact dumbbell with a smooth, light-colored cylindrical handle and dark, rounded rubber-coated end caps. The design is simple, modern, and free of visible markings or logos.
description_view_0: The dumbbell is seen from the side, showing the full length of the handle and both rounded end caps.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to view 0, with the handle and end caps fully visible and no additional features apparent.
description_view_2: The dumbbell is shown from another side, again displaying the cylindrical handle and symmetrical end caps.
description_view_3: This view mirrors the previous ones, with the same clear view of the handle and end caps, maintaining the object's symmetry.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, round cross-section, smooth surface, no visible ergonomic features.
attribute_end_cap_design: Rounded, flat-faced end caps with beveled edges, dark rubber coating, no visible patterns or features.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible wear, scratches, or damage.
